inputs.label: Current Age
inputs.businessContext: Your current age. Used for reference to determine how many years until early retirement eligibility.

inputs.label: Full Retirement Age (FRA)
inputs.businessContext: The age at which you receive 100% of your Primary Insurance Amount (PIA). Typically 67 for those born after 1960.

inputs.label: Desired Early Retirement Age
inputs.businessContext: The age you plan to start claiming Social Security benefits. Must be at least 62.

inputs.label: Primary Insurance Amount (PIA)
inputs.businessContext: Your estimated monthly benefit at full retirement age in today's dollars.
